description: Self-improving deck loop: load conventions at session start, capture corrections at session end.

hooks.prompt: Before you finish: scan THIS session for moments where the user corrected your deck work (rewrote a slide, changed an explanation order, fixed tone, removed an em dash, reworked a diagram, or rejected a framing). For each correction, decide if it reveals a DURABLE deck-design preference that is not already captured in ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/deck-design/deck-conventions.md. If it does, append a single concise bullet to that file under the right heading (Pedagogy, Structure, Voice, Diagrams, or Citations), phrased as a reusable rule, not a one-off. Never invent preferences the user did not signal. If nothing durable came up, do nothing and stay silent. Always honour the standing rule: no em dashes in any output.
